content: Commander Lilith & the Fight for Sanctuary
name: Hot Mama
description: An effervescent Jakobs sniper rifle that becomes perfectly accurate while scoped. That makes it especially valuable for builds that normally struggle with accuracy, and its incendiary damage plus stacking critical-hit bonus reward clean, repeated headshots.

special.title: Sniper is a lonely occupation.
special.description: Always Incendiary. Fires bullets that leave a heart trail. Aiming down sights sets accuracy to 100%. Critical hits or critical kills grant a stack that increases critical hit damage by 50%. Stacks have no cap, but each lasts 12 seconds and you can only gain one stack every 5 seconds. Has unique voice lines while equipped.

notes: It only rolls with a Maliwan scope, a Dahl grip, and the bladed accessory. Its critical-hit bonus can only gain one new stack every five seconds, and each stack lasts twelve seconds on its own timer.
